action: Use execute_windows_command to click the Testing icon in the activity bar, locate the test_calculator_app.py test suite in the GUI sidebar, and click the green “Run” button next to it.
fallback_action: If the action fails in the future, notify the user directly.

recipe.steps: Click the Testing icon in the Visual Studio Code activity bar. Locate the test_calculator_app.py test suite in the GUI sidebar and click the green 'Run' button next to it.
